# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'BUILD_ENVIRONMENT',
            choices: ['development', 'staging', 'production'],
            description: 'Select the target environment for the build'
        )
        string(
            name: 'BRANCH_NAME',
            defaultValue: 'main',
            description: 'Git branch to build from'
        )
        string(
            name: 'REPO_URL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Git repository URL to clone'
        )
        text(
            name: 'SETUP_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Installing dependencies..."
# Add your setup commands here
# e.g., npm install, pip install -r requirements.txt, mvn dependency:resolve''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run during the setup phase (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'BUILD_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running build..."
# Add your build commands here
# e.g., npm run build, mvn package, gradle build, make all''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run during the build phase (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'TEST_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running tests..."
# Add your test commands here
# e.g., npm test, pytest, mvn test, go test ./...''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run during the test phase (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'LINT_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running linting and static analysis..."
# Add your lint/analysis commands here
# e.g., eslint ., flake8, checkstyle''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run during the lint/analysis phase (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'PACKAGE_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Packaging artifacts..."
# Add your packaging commands here
# e.g., docker build, tar czf, zip''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run during the packaging phase (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'DEPLOY_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Deploying application..."
# Add your deployment commands here
# e.g., kubectl apply, aws deploy, scp, rsync''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run during the deployment phase (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'POST_DEPLOY_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running post-deployment verification..."
# Add your post-deploy verification commands here
# e.g., curl health check, smoke tests''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run after deployment for verification (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'CLEANUP_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Cleaning up..."
# Add your cleanup commands here
# e.g., docker system prune, rm -rf tmp/''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run during the cleanup phase (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES',
            defaultValue: '''# Define environment variables as KEY=VALUE (one per line)
# e.g.,
# APP_PORT=8080
# LOG_LEVEL=info''',
            description: 'Custom environment variables to set (KEY=VALUE format, one per line)'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_TESTS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the test phase'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_LINT',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the lint/analysis phase'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_DEPLOY',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the deployment phase'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'DRY_RUN',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Print commands without executing them'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_PATTERNS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated glob patterns for archiving artifacts (e.g., **/target/*.jar, dist/**/*)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'TEST_REPORT_PATTERNS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated glob patterns for JUnit test reports (e.g., **/test-results/*.xml)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'TIMEOUT_MINUTES',
            defaultValue: '60',
            description: 'Maximum time in minutes for the entire pipeline to run'
        )
    }

    options {
        timestamps()
        ansiColor('xterm')
        timeout(time: params.TIMEOUT_MINUTES ? params.TIMEOUT_MINUTES.toInteger() : 60, unit: 'MINUTES')
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '20'))
    }

    environment {
        BUILD_ENV = "${params.BUILD_ENVIRONMENT}"
        PIPELINE_DRY_RUN = "${params.DRY_RUN}"
    }

    stages {
        stage('Initialize') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "============================================="
                    echo "Pipeline Configuration Summary"
                    echo "============================================="
                    echo "Environment:    ${params.BUILD_ENVIRONMENT}"
                    echo "Branch:         ${params.BRANCH_NAME}"
                    echo "Repository:     ${params.REPO_URL ?: 'N/A (using workspace)'}"
                    echo "Skip Tests:     ${params.SKIP_TESTS}"
                    echo "Skip Lint:      ${params.SKIP_LINT}"
                    echo "Skip Deploy:    ${params.SKIP_DEPLOY}"
                    echo "Dry Run:        ${params.DRY_RUN}"
                    echo "Timeout:        ${params.TIMEOUT_MINUTES} minutes"
                    echo "============================================="

                    env.CUSTOM_ENV_VARS = parseAndSetEnvVars(params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Checkout') {
            when {
                expression { return params.REPO_URL?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Checking out ${params.BRANCH_NAME} from ${params.REPO_URL}"
                    git branch: params.BRANCH_NAME,
                        url: params.REPO_URL
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Set Environment Variables') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def envVarLines = params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES?.split('\n') ?: []
                    def exportCommands = []

                    envVarLines.each { line ->
                        def trimmedLine = line.trim()
                        if (trimmedLine && !trimmedLine.startsWith('#')) {
                            def parts = trimmedLine.split('=', 2)
                            if (parts.length == 2) {
                                def key = parts[0].trim()
                                def value = parts[1].trim()
                                env."${key}" = value
                                exportCommands.add("export ${key}=\"${value}\"")
                                echo "Set environment variable: ${key}=${value}"
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    env.EXPORT_COMMANDS = exportCommands.join('\n')
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Setup') {
            steps {
                script {
                    executeCommands('Setup', params.SETUP_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    executeCommands('Build', params.BUILD_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Lint & Analysis') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_LINT }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeCommands('Lint & Analysis', params.LINT_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_TESTS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeCommands('Test', params.TEST_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
            post {
                always {
                    script {
                        if (params.TEST_REPORT_PATTERNS?.trim()) {
                            def patterns = params.TEST_REPORT_PATTERNS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                            patterns.each { pattern ->
                                try {
                                    junit allowEmptyResults: true, testResults: pattern
                                } catch (Exception e) {
                                    echo "Warning: Could not process test reports for pattern '${pattern}': ${e.message}"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Package') {
            steps {
                script {
                    executeCommands('Package', params.PACKAGE_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Archive Artifacts') {
            when {
                expression { return params.ARTIFACT_PATTERNS?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def patterns = params.ARTIFACT_PATTERNS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    patterns.each { pattern ->
                        try {
                            archiveArtifacts artifacts: pattern, allowEmptyArchive: true, fingerprint: true
                            echo "Archived artifacts matching: ${pattern}"
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            echo "Warning: Could not archive artifacts for pattern '${pattern}': ${e.message}"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_DEPLOY }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.BUILD_ENVIRONMENT == 'production' && !params.DRY_RUN) {
                        timeout(time: 15, unit: 'MINUTES') {
                            input message: "Approve deployment to PRODUCTION?",
                                  ok: 'Deploy to Production',
                                  submitter: 'admin,deployers'
                        }
                    }
                    executeCommands('Deploy', params.DEPLOY_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Post-Deploy Verification') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_DEPLOY }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeCommands('Post-Deploy Verification', params.POST_DEPLOY_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            script {
                echo "============================================="
                echo "Running Cleanup"
                echo "============================================="
                executeCommands('Cleanup', params.CLEANUP_COMMANDS)
            }
        }
        success {
            echo "============================================="
            echo "Pipeline completed SUCCESSFULLY"
            echo "Environment: ${params.BUILD_ENVIRONMENT}"
            echo "============================================="
        }
        failure {
            echo "============================================="
            echo "Pipeline FAILED"
            echo "Environment: ${params.BUILD_ENVIRONMENT}"
            echo "Please review the logs above for details."
            echo "============================================="
        }
        unstable {
            echo "============================================="
            echo "Pipeline completed with UNSTABLE status"
            echo "Environment: ${params.BUILD_ENVIRONMENT}"
            echo "Some tests may have failed."
            echo "============================================="
        }
        aborted {
            echo "============================================="
            echo "Pipeline was ABORTED"
            echo "============================================="
        }
    }
}

def executeCommands(String stageName, String commands) {
    if (!commands?.trim()) {
        echo "No commands specified for ${stageName} stage. Skipping."
        return
    }

    def filteredCommands = commands.split('\n').findAll { line ->
        def trimmed = line.trim()
        trimmed && !trimmed.startsWith('#')
    }.join('\n')

    if (!filteredCommands?.trim()) {
        echo "No executable commands found for ${stageName} stage (all lines are comments). Skipping."
        return
    }

    echo "============================================="
    echo "Executing ${stageName} Commands"
    echo "============================================="

    if (params.DRY_RUN) {
        echo "[DRY RUN] The following commands would be executed:"
        echo "---------------------------------------------"
        echo filteredCommands
        echo "---------------------------------------------"
    } else {
        def exportPrefix = env.EXPORT_COMMANDS ? "${env.EXPORT_COMMANDS}\n" : ""

        def shellScript = """#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

${exportPrefix}
echo "--- ${stageName} Phase Start ---"

${filteredCommands}

echo "--- ${stageName} Phase Complete ---"
"""
        sh shellScript
    }
}

def parseAndSetEnvVars(String envVarText) {
    def result = [:]
    if (!envVarText?.trim()) {
        return result
    }

    envVarText.split('\n').each { line ->
        def trimmedLine = line.trim()
        if (trimmedLine && !trimmedLine.startsWith('#')) {
            def parts = trimmedLine.split('=', 2)
            if (parts.length == 2) {
                result[parts[0].trim()] = parts[1].trim()
            }
        }
    }
    return result
}
